{{CargoRelic
|name=The King in Yellow
|class_id=22916
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The King in Yellow is a play in two acts, with the first act being milder, while the second delivers a profound shock to the reader. It is a fountain of forbidden knowledge, chronicling a series of ambiguous and dreamlike plays. Whether one is a reader, an actor, or a spectator, they will slowly be dominated by the dreams sent by Hastur. The soul cannot sing, falling into endless madness.
|fame=68
|art=52
|fth=76
|civ=58
|tech=108
|ss1=Poison DMG +6%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +3%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +3<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss2=Poison DMG +8%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +4%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +4<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss3=Poison DMG +10%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +5%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +5<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss4=Poison DMG +14%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +7%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +7<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss5=Poison DMG +18%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +9%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +9<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss6=Poison DMG +24%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +12%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +12<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000
|ss7=Poison DMG +24%<br>Dragon Minion DEF +12%<br>Per 30 Gold Daily Packs bought, Snail ATK +12<br>Gold Daily Packs Bought: 3000/3000<br>Poison DMG +20% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT +9%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, Troop CRIT DMG +9%
|skill3=[[File:Biozilla skill III.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's TECH +15
}}
